design_philosophy: Biohacking command center. A fusion of Cardiologist, Neuroscientist, and Performance Coach. Information density is high, but hierarchy is absolute. We use tactical minimalism: 1px hard borders instead of soft shadows, pure white data on obsidian backgrounds, and high-visibility neon accents for status indicators. The UI must feel like a precision instrument for measuring human performance.

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8
layout_and_spacing.card_structure: border border-white/10 bg-neutral-900/40 backdrop-blur-xl flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden

surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Flat background (bg-neutral-900/40), 1px subtle border (border-white/10), no drop shadow. On hover: border-white/30 and bg-neutral-900/60.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.nudge_card: The Tracing Beam effect. Add a glowing gradient line that travels around the container edge or a highly visible inner glow to signify immediate action required.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.v_score_hero: Retro-Futurism. Deep neutral-950 background with a scanline overlay (CSS repeating-linear-gradient) and a massive JetBrains Mono data readout.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.inputs: Tactical, flat. bg-neutral-950, border-white/20, focus:border-cyan-400 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-400.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.glass: Crystal Glass for headers/modals: bg-neutral-950/70, backdrop-blur-2xl, border-b border-white/10.

components.navigation: Sticky top bar, z-50, backdrop-blur-xl bg-neutral-950/80, border-b border-white/10. Contains Logo ('VitalFlow'), User Avatar, and quick 'Add Data' CTA.
components.biometric_form: Shadcn Dialog or fixed Side Panel. Inputs: sliders for HRV, BPM, Sleep Hours, Cognitive Load. Must feel like a scientific intake form. Use standard Shadcn form components but overridden with tactical styling (sharp edges, no soft rings).
components.v_score_display: Large central or left widget. Shows the massive 0-100 number. The color of this number and its container's subtle glow MUST map to the Status_Visual (Green, Yellow, Red).
components.affected_areas: A 2x2 grid or horizontal flex of 'Area_Afetada' (Brain, Heart, Muscles, Digestion). Use Phosphor icons. Active area gets the status color, others remain dimmed (text-neutral-600).
components.ai_analysis: Text block with 'Causa_Provavel' and 'Tag_Rapida'. Use a monospace label for the tag (e.g., [FADIGA_CEREBRAL]). Text is IBM Plex Sans.
components.nudge_action: High-visibility button/card at the bottom or right. 'Nudge_Acao'. E.g., 'Do 5 mins of box breathing'. Button uses the status color as a subtle pulse or glow.
components.history_chart: Recharts AreaChart or LineChart. X-axis: Days. Y-axis: V-Score. Line color maps to the latest status, with a gradient fill below it.

interactions_and_motion.hover: All interactive elements must have a visible hover state (e.g., bg-white/5 to bg-white/10, or border-white/10 to border-white/30). Text color must remain high-contrast.
interactions_and_motion.data_reveal: Use Framer Motion to animate the V-Score number counting up, and stagger the entrance of the affected areas.
interactions_and_motion.nudge_pulse: If status is Red or Yellow, the Nudge button should have a slow, subtle infinite pulse animation (scale 1 to 1.02) to draw attention.

images.description: Abstract green data lines. Use this as a very low opacity (10-15%) absolute background behind the main V-Score hero card to give a 'data flow' vibe. Apply a radial-gradient mask to fade it into the black background.
Athletic professional man for the user profile avatar in the header.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React. Example mapping: Brain -> Brain, Heart -> HeartPulse, Muscles -> Dumbbell or Activity, Digestion -> Stethoscope or Apple.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: Add data-testid to ALL interactive elements. Example: data-testid='submit-biometrics-button', data-testid='vscore-value', data-testid='nudge-action-card'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text over the dark background meets minimum 4.5:1 APCA. Do not use pure #000000; stick to the zinc/neutral-950 scale.
accessibility_and_testing.reduced_motion: Wrap Framer Motion animations to respect prefers-reduced-motion.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the required fonts via Google Fonts in index.html or layout.jsx: 'Chivo', 'IBM Plex Sans', 'JetBrains Mono'.

Use Shadcn components for structural elements but override the default rounding and shadows. Replace `rounded-lg` with `rounded-md` or `rounded-none`. Remove `shadow-md` and use `border border-white/10`.
Implement the 'Biometric Input Form' as a floating panel or a prominent card that feeds data to a local state.
The AI Analysis block should mock a response based on the input: HRV, BPM, and Cognitive Load (Sleep + Apps). Output the structured JSON schema defined in the problem statement.
For the V-Score, create a dynamic styling function that returns the optimal, warning, or danger color classes based on the score (e.g., >80 Green, 50-80 Yellow, <50 Red).
Do NOT use Space Grotesk. Use JetBrains Mono for the large V-Score number.
Implement a mock history chart using Recharts with a sleek, dark-mode styling (no grid lines, pure data line).
Keep spacing generous but layout dense (Control Room Grid). Use gap-6 between cards.
